_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutant mice with p19ARF gene loss develop accelerated hematopoietic disease resembling acute leukemia with a variable phenotype.

_contextSnippet: recipients of bone marrow derived from p19−/− donors showed a significantly increased expansion of Mac1+, Gr1Lo cells relative to Mac1+, Gr1Hi cells in the bone marrow...the percentage of Mac1+, Gr1Lo cells tended to exceed the number of Mac1+, Gr1Hi cells
details: p19-/- recipients showed significantly increased expansion of Mac1+, Gr1Lo cells relative to Mac1+, Gr1Hi cells in bone marrow, with Mac1+, Gr1Lo cells tending to exceed Mac1+, Gr1Hi cells
